title: hieracium permaculatum subsp. cacuminicola
intro: Hieracium permaculatum subsp. cacuminicola is a sub-species of the Hieracium permaculatum plant, commonly known as Mountain hawkweed, a perennial plant native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and treat digestive issues such as dyspepsia and indigestion. The health benefits of Hieracium permaculatum subsp. cacuminicola include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
